name: get_problem_details
description: Fetch full context for a Dynatrace problem ID from the Dynatrace MCP server. Returns title, severity, start time, status, and Davis AI root cause analysis.

problemId.description: The Dynatrace problem ID e.g. P-230948

name: get_affected_entities
description: Get all services, hosts, and processes implicated in a Dynatrace problem. Returns entity names, types, and health status.

name: query_metrics
description: Fetch time-series metric data from Dynatrace for a specific entity and time window. Use metricSelector: 'builtin:service.errors.total.rate' for error rate, 'builtin:service.response.time:percentile(99)' for p99 latency.

from.description: Start time ISO 8601 or relative e.g. now-5m

to.description: End time ISO 8601 or relative e.g. now

name: fetch_logs
description: Fetch recent log lines from affected entities via Dynatrace. Pass filter: 'ERROR' to focus on errors. Returns raw log lines as strings.

name: list_recent_commits
description: List commits on a GitHub repo branch within the last N hours. Merge commits are filtered out. Use to find deploys that may have caused the incident.

name: get_commit_diff
description: Get the full diff for a specific commit. Returns changed files with patches. Use to identify dangerous changes: removed env vars, middleware refactors, schema changes.

name: revert_commit
description: DESTRUCTIVE. Creates a revert commit and pushes it. Only call this AFTER approvalStatus is confirmed as 'approved' in Firestore. Will throw an error if approval is not present.

sha.description: SHA of the commit to revert

incidentId.description: Firestore incident ID — used to verify approval

name: post_incident_summary
description: Post a structured incident summary to the #on-call Slack channel with Approve/Reject buttons. Call this after forming the recommendation.

incidentId.description: Firestore incident ID — used to fetch the full incident and build the Slack message

name: write_reasoning_step
description: Append a reasoning step to the incident's Firestore steps subcollection. Call before and after every significant action. The dashboard streams these steps in real time.

label.description: Short description of this step e.g. 'Pulling problem context from Dynatrace'

content.description: Full narrative of the agent's reasoning for this step

toolCalls.description: Tool calls made during this step

result.description: Result summary e.g. '200 OK' or '3 entities'

logLines.description: Raw log lines from fetch_logs. Include timestamps. Max 20 lines.
